title: New DWP update on AI checks for Universal Credit Advance payments

content:

title: AI Is Changing Who Gets Rich From Startups
description: The share of startup equity going to employees under 30 is falling while venture money crowds into artificial intelligence. How much of that shift is caused by AI is contested.
content: For years, one of the surer ways for an ordinary employee to build wealth was to join a startup early and take equity instead of a bigger salary, on the chance the shares were worth something later. Fewer young workers are being handed that chance no... [8389 chars]

title: OpenAI is showing Kalshi’s World Cup odds in ChatGPT
description: NEW YORK — Kalshi, the startup that lets users wager on almost anything, has struck a partnership with artificial intelligence (AI) company OpenAI to show World Cup prediction market data in ChatGPT search results.
content:

title: China's exports surge as AI boom drives strong demand
description: China has reported its export picked up pace in June, jumping 27 per cent from a year earlier thanks to strong demand from the boom in artificial intelligence.
content:
China's exports accelerated in June, jumping 27 per cent from a year earlier thanks partly to the boom in artificial intelligence, the customs agency says.
The increase in exports in June was much better than economists had expected. Exports rose 19.... [2198 chars]

title: 7,700 jobs down: India’s top private banks’ workforce reduce as tech wonder gets busy
description: India's largest private banks are reducing staff numbers. This shift reflects increased automation and artificial intelligence adoption. Technology now handles routine operations, freeing human resources for customer-facing roles. Banks like HDFC and Axis Bank are redeploying talent to advisory and sales functions. This trend signals changing skill requirements across the banking industry.
content: India's biggest private lenders have shed more than 7,700 jobs in the last financial year as automation, artificial intelligence and digital infrastructure investments begin to pay-off and reduce reliance on routine operational roles, signalling a st... [4171 chars]

title: Meet DeepSeek's Liang Wenfeng, the Chinese entrepreneur who is now world's richest AI founder, surpassing Anthropic's Dario Amodei
description: DeepSeek founder Liang Wenfeng's net worth has significantly increased after a recent funding round. He is now the world's wealthiest creator of artificial intelligence models. This surge in valuation makes him a prominent figure in China's tech landscape. His company's success is attributed to early investments in computing power. Liang's substantial equity retention distinguishes him from Silicon Valley peers.

title: Global investors turn most bullish since February, BofA survey shows
description: Global investor sentiment has climbed to its strongest level since February, with fund managers growing more optimistic on ​the economic outlook, artificial intelligence-linked spending and the prospect ‌of a dovish Federal Reserve, Bank of America's latest Global Fund Manager Survey showed.

content:

description: In the first of a two-part series on how India is preparing for an AI-powered future, CNA examines the growing business of artificial intelligence upskilling and the questions surrounding the value of these programmes.
content:
